description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a smooth, flat top and four slender, tapered legs. The tabletop has a natural wood grain finish, giving it a warm and inviting appearance. Each leg is attached at the corners and features a subtle metallic accent at the joint where it meets the tabletop. The design is minimalist and modern, with clean lines and no visible drawers or additional features. The table appears sturdy yet lightweight, suitable for a variety of uses such as dining, working, or social gatherings. Its neutral color and simple form make it versatile for placement in urban parks, outdoor cafes, or communal indoor spaces.
description: A minimalist rectangular wooden table with a smooth top and four tapered legs, featuring subtle metallic accents at the joints. Its clean design and natural wood finish make it suitable for various urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and all four legs, with metallic accents visible at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the tabletop and the alignment of the two visible legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the tabletop and all four legs with metallic corner details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the slim tabletop and two legs.
